typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	CountInsertedRecords as integer (),
	CountRowsToInsert as integer (),
	ExecuteSeriesFlag as integer (),
	sRAndSEmailAddress as string ()
}

source(output(
		combid as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT combid FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[iTracker_Active_SN_CIO] WHERE CAST(IMPORTDATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> TodaysInsertedRowcount
TodaysInsertedRowcount sink(input(
		combid as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	mapColumn(
		combid)) ~> OutputPlaceHolderRowCount
